channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 248,000 — Prime Eastlea Investment Opportunity (Eastlea, Harare East)
item.description: USD 248,000 — Eastlea, Harare East. 4 beds, 1 bath. Prime Eastlea Investment Opportunity. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
